summary: Full e2e testing of WhatsApp Conversational Funnel (iteration 66). 10/10 pytest cases pass on backend (simulate, reset, analytics, keyword shortcut, quote→Hot lead creation, brochure URL, unrecognised input fallback, admin auth guard). Frontend /admin/whatsapp-funnel page renders all 13 data-testid anchors; sidebar nav link navigates correctly; simulator flow (hi → division 1 → product_picker) works end-to-end; refresh + reset buttons function; conversion funnel bars, per-division list, and recent events table populate from live analytics. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: whatsapp_funnel._upgrade_lead_to_quote() overwrites inquiry_type/source on ANY existing lead matched by phone_whatsapp — an existing inbound WhatsApp lead's prior inquiry context will be replaced silently. Consider merging instead of setting.

funnel_analytics() uses action='brochure' and 'quote' as exact-match filters, but _log_event() stores them as plain 'quote' / 'brochure' strings — OK today, but if someone logs 'quote_sent' later the count silently breaks. Consider using a regex or an explicit stage enum.

detect_division_from_text iterates DIVISION_KEYWORDS in dict order; 'plate' matches Trauma but if a different division ever adds 'plate' too, order becomes undefined. Fine for now but document priority or use a list.

try_handle_funnel in product_picker returns None (falls through to AI) when selected slug doesn't exist in catalog_products_col — this causes silent dead-ends. Should build a 'sorry, pick again' reply instead.
parse_product_choice accepts A-E but build_products_menu only renders A-C (limit=3) — leftover dead code for D/E. Minor.
seed_data_creation: Test leads created with unique phone numbers per test run (~9...). Funnel events inserted into funnel_events collection. No cleanup performed — test phone numbers are clearly synthetic (start with 9 + epoch-based suffix).
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Funnel endpoints: GET /api/admin/whatsapp/funnel-analytics, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/funnel-simulate {phone,message}, POST /api/admin/whatsapp/funnel-reset {phone}. All admin-guarded. State stored on wa_conversations_col.funnel; events in funnel_events_col. Frontend at /admin/whatsapp-funnel uses all documented data-testids. Reuse /app/backend/tests/test_whatsapp_funnel_iter66.py for regression — uses unique time-based phones so safe to re-run.
